content.thinking:
Let me analyze the task. I need to fix multiple configuration issues in a multi-tenant Spark environment on Kubernetes. The issues are:

1. History Server PVC Reference - wrong PVC name
2. History Server Log Directory - wrong path
3. Team A RoleBinding Namespace - wrong namespace in subject

Let me first check the current state of the environment, then apply the fixes.

content.thinking:
The current state confirms all three issues:
1. History Server pod is Pending because PVC `spark-history-pvc-wrong` not found
2. RoleBinding has `namespace: default` instead of `spark-team-a`
3. Log directory needs to be fixed too

Let me now apply all three fixes.

content.text: All three issues confirmed. Now applying all three fixes in parallel.

input.command:
kubectl patch deployment spark-history-server -n spark-history --type=json \
  -p='[{"op": "replace", "path": "/spec/template/spec/volumes/0/persistentVolumeClaim/claimName", "value": "spark-history-pvc"}]' 2>&1 && \
kubectl set env deployment/spark-history-server -n spark-history \
  SPARK_HISTORY_OPTS="-Dspark.history.fs.logDirectory=/mnt/spark-logs -Dspark.history.fs.update.interval=5s" 2>&1
input.description: Fix History Server PVC name and log directory

content.text: All three patches applied. Now polling for convergence.

input.command:
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  echo "=== Attempt $i ==="
  HS=$(kubectl get pods -n spark-history -l app=spark-history-server --no-headers 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2, $3}')
  JA=$(kubectl get job spark-pi-team-a -n spark-team-a --no-headers 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2}')
  JB=$(kubectl get job spark-pi-team-b -n spark-team-b --no-headers 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2}')
  echo "History Server pods: $HS"
  echo "spark-pi-team-a completions: $JA"
  echo "spark-pi-team-b completions: $JB"
  
  # Check if all done
  HS_RUNNING=$(kubectl get pods -n spark-history -l app=spark-history-server --no-headers 2>/dev/null | grep "1/1" | wc -l)
  JA_DONE=$(echo "$JA" | grep -c "1/1" || true)
  JB_DONE=$(echo "$JB" | grep -c "1/1" || true)
  
  if [ "$HS_RUNNING" -ge 1 ] && [ "$JA_DONE" -ge 1 ] && [ "$JB_DONE" -ge 1 ]; then
    echo "=== ALL SUCCESS ==="
    break
  fi
  sleep 10
done
input.description: Poll until History Server is running and both jobs complete

description: Poll until History Server is running and both jobs complete
